<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-2_chunk005.pdf#page=2 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-2 p202 -->

<!-- header: RESIDENZ -->

<!-- header: THEATINERGAN -->


[[File:Band03-2_chunk005_p002_img001.jpg|thumb]]

<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-2 p203 -->
